ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-15-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SPECIALLY SET TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D) WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 12/27/05 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 12/16/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. PLAINTIFF INDICATED THAT CASE IS AT-ISSUE. PREFERENCE CONDITIONAL UPON MR. HERNANDEZ' DEPOSITION BEING COMPLETED BY 10/7/05. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER TO RESOLVE EXCHANGING INFORMATION BY 9/30/05. FRICTION INTERROGATORIES DUE BY 10/21/05. VERIFICATION TO INTERROGATORIES SET NO. 1 TO BE PROVED BY 4:00 P.M. ON 9/22/05. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 10/28/05, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ORDER SIGNED. HON. ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERK: V.MU; REPORTER: SUSAN MURPHY, CSR 	328 (206)

REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON AUG-16-2006. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 206 ON DEC-27-2005 AT 11:15 AM FOR TRIAL. ASSIGNED FOR MANDATORY SETTLEMENT IN DEPT. 304 ON DEC-16-2005 AT 9:30 AM. ALL EXPEDITED SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTIONS WILL BE HEARD AT THAT TIME IN DEPT. 608.
